'''鈭歞h-p-m-th''' ('''kadhapmethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:durate|durate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:durate|durate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapmethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapmethoko|thidhapmethoko]] || [[word:jidhapmethoko|jidhapmethoko]] || [[word:shidhapmethoko|shidhapmethoko]] || [[word:kidhapmethoko|kidhapmethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhapmethoko|thuthudhapmethoko]] || [[word:jujudhapmethoko|jujudhapmethoko]] || [[word:shushudhapmethoko|shushudhapmethoko]] || [[word:kukudhapmethoko|kukudhapmethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhapmethoko|thedhapmethoko]] || [[word:jedhapmethoko|jedhapmethoko]] || [[word:shedhapmethoko|shedhapmethoko]] || [[word:kedhapmethoko|kedhapmethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhapmethoko|th忙dhapmethoko]] || [[word:j忙dhapmethoko|j忙dhapmethoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhapmethoko|sh忙dhapmethoko]] || [[word:k忙dhapmethoko|k忙dhapmethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhapmethithi|shadhapmethithi]] || [[word:shadhapmethiji|shadhapmethiji]] || [[word:shadhapmethishi|shadhapmethishi]] || [[word:shadhapmethiki|shadhapmethiki]]
